backend/main.mo: Motoko canister managing audio posts with add, edit, remove, retrieval, and per-user content tracking plus authorization checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping product requirements to frontend files and components with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: List of frontend file summaries describing component purposes and key behaviors.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining design tokens and light/dark theme variables.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point loading the root React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app configuring routing, global providers, layout, and navigation.
frontend/src/components/auth/InterestsCh: Checkbox group component for selecting user interests with simple state updates.
frontend/src/components/categories/Categ: Category filter chip UI enabling selection and highlighting via feed filter state.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashbo: Dashboard hero card shown when a user has no uploads, with profile completion indicator and upload CTA.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/MyCont: Renders the user's audio posts with edit, delete, and playback functionality using dialogs and hooks. Handles loading, error states, and updates via mutations.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Statis: Displays user statistics such as total uploads and listens with loading and error states. Uses formatted numbers and simple card-based layout.
frontend/src/components/feed/AudioCard.t: Shows an audio item with playback, likes, comments, and deletion options for backend or draft posts. Integrates player controls, mutations, and a comments panel.
frontend/src/components/feed/CommentsPan: Renders a scrollable comments list or a placeholder when empty. Displays author initials, timestamps, and content.
frontend/src/components/feed/ProceduralC: Displays either a custom thumbnail or a procedurally generated image based on category and ID. Chooses thumbnail unless it's a known placeholder.
frontend/src/components/language/Languag: Provides a searchable multi-select dropdown for languages with support for adding custom entries. Manages selected languages and validation states.
frontend/src/components/layout/BrandingB: Shows the site branding with a logo, fallback text, dropdown menu, and slogan. Handles logo loading errors.
Dropdown navigation menu providing links to key site pages. Uses router navigation on item selection.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingB: Floating button that returns users to the feed, hidden when audio is playing. Uses player state and router navigation.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingL: Floating button and popover allowing users to search, select, and add custom languages for feed filtering, hidden when mini‑player is active.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Main site header with menu, navigation, search bar, and authentication controls using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/layout/PrimaryNa: Top navigation bar displaying primary routes with active‑state highlighting.
frontend/src/components/onboarding/Onboa: Multi‑step onboarding flow with progress, navigation buttons, and animated icons.
frontend/src/components/player/MiniPlaye: Fixed bottom mini‑player providing playback controls, progress, volume, and close functionality when an item is active.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchBar: Search input that updates feed filters and auto‑selects a default language on focus or change.
frontend/src/components/upload/AudioSour: Component for uploading or recording audio with recording controls, MIME detection, cleanup handling, and preview support.
frontend/src/components/upload/CategoryP: Dropdown component for selecting or creating a custom category, using a popover and command list UI.
frontend/src/components/upload/UploadFor: Main audio upload form handling authentication, validation, file upload, and navigation after submission.
frontend/src/components/upload/useAudioD: Hook that validates an audio file's duration and flags files exceeding a 3‑hour limit.
frontend/src/constants/categories.ts: Defines the list of core categories and exports the Category type.
frontend/src/constants/categoryColors.ts: Provides color and badge class mappings for categories with helpers to retrieve them.
frontend/src/constants/interests.ts: Builds a combined interests list from categories plus additional predefined interests.
frontend/src/constants/languages.ts: Exports a comprehensive list of supported ISO 639‑1 languages and language interface.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user's identity, refreshing dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomLanguages.ts: Hook for managing custom languages with localStorage persistence, deduping, and lookup utilities.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and provider for managing Internet Identity login, state, and AuthClient setup.
frontend/src/hooks/useMyContent.ts: Fetches the user's audio posts and exposes mutations for editing and deleting them with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts: Tracks onboarding completion status in localStorage with helpers to mark or reset.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines mutations for adding, listening to, and removing audio posts with cache updates and toast feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserStatistics.ts: Fetches user statistics from the backend when an actor is available.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base and theme styling including custom color variables, typography, and component styles.
frontend/src/lib/draftFeedItems.ts: Manages draft audio items in localStorage, including saving, retrieving, deleting, and change subscriptions.
frontend/src/lib/formatters.ts: Provides helpers for compact number formatting and converting seconds to MM:SS.
frontend/src/lib/proceduralCovers.ts: Generates deterministic SVG cover art based on category and a seeded random generator.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a utility to merge Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/mock/mockAudio.ts: Defines mock audio and comment interfaces and provides a list of sample audio items for the feed.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Displays a static About page with placeholder text about the SPEAKR platform.
frontend/src/pages/AuthPage.tsx: Implements login and registration forms with email, password, and interest selection.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Renders a placeholder Contact page announcing upcoming contact options.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Shows user dashboard with authentication checks, statistics, and content sections.
frontend/src/pages/ExplorePage.tsx: Displays category cards that navigate to filtered feed views when clicked.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Builds the main feed by combining mock, draft, and backend items and applying filters.
frontend/src/pages/HelpPage.tsx: Shows a placeholder Help and FAQ page with in-progress messaging.
frontend/src/pages/OnboardingPage.tsx: Runs the onboarding wizard and marks completion before navigating to the feed.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPage.tsx: Displays a placeholder Privacy Policy page with future content notes.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Shows a placeholder Terms of Service page awaiting finalized content.
frontend/src/pages/UploadPage.tsx: Provides the UI wrapper for the audio upload form.
frontend/src/player/PlayerProvider.tsx: Implements a React audio player context with play, pause, seek, volume control, and tracking of progress and current item.
frontend/src/state/feedFilters.ts: Defines a persisted Zustand store for feed filter settings, including search, category, languages, and hydration handling.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers for reading URL parameters, persisting them in sessionStorage, and clearing them from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind theme extensions, colors, fonts, shadows, animations, and plugin usage.
project_state.json: Describes project state and feature requirements for implementing user-authorized permanent deletion of uploads from the main feed.
